name: mail-reacher-js
description: Official TypeScript SDK and framework integrations for Mail Reacher: Next.js, TanStack Start and Nodemailer.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @mail-reacher/sdk build && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/next build && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/nodemailer build && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/tanstack-start build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @mail-reacher/sdk typecheck && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/sdk build && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/next typecheck && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/nodemailer typecheck && yarn workspace @mail-reacher/tanstack-start typecheck
scripts.pack: yarn build && yarn workspaces run pack
scripts.publish:packages: yarn build && npm publish packages/sdk --access public && npm publish packages/next --access public && npm publish packages/nodemailer --access public && npm publish packages/tanstack-start --access public
